record.field: Bank received payment but invoice/bill for this sale has not been created yet. Carries the gap forward until the bill is generated.
HUB shows the sale but bank hasn't settled it yet. Carries the gap forward until settlement appears.
Amount Not Received — Re-collected from Patient
Original payment failed/glitched. Agent re-collected from patient on a later date. Carries the gap forward until the re-collection appears.
This sale matches a previously carried-forward gap for the same clinic/TID/mode. Select the pending entry to net it off.
The re-collected payment from a prior glitch has now appeared. Select the pending entry to net it off.
Received via Other Channel (Scanner / Direct Transfer)
Extra bank amount came through a channel not covered by this CSV (e.g. UPI scanner, NEFT). Drop the difference — no carry forward.
